title: Why Neanderthals Might Be Our Cousins After All - David Reich
summary: David Reich discusses evidence that Neanderthals may have had a closer evolutionary relationship to modern humans than previously thought. The conversation explores recent genetic findings about the relatedness and potential kinship between Neanderthal and human populations.
